diagnostic.help: declare the clock place in topology before using it in a timer
diagnostic.message: timer clock place (missing_clock) for transition [on_tick] is not declared

source.text:
net cadence_tick_unresolved_clock

(tick_latch) -tick_latch-> [on_tick] -tick_latch-> (tick_latch)
[on_tick] handler "on_tick@cadence"
[on_tick] timer clock (missing_clock) cel "clock.now >= 0"
